quickApps.name: QA Dist Manager
quickApps.description: Install, upgrade, or downgrade other QuickApps from a GitHub manifest — directly from the HC3 UI. This entry lets QA Dist Manager update itself.

quickApps.name: Yahue
quickApps.description: This is a quick app that allows you to control your Philips Hue devices as you like. Creates QuickApps for your Philips Hue devices.

quickApps.name: EventRunner6
quickApps.description: Universal Home Automation Rule system. Create rules triggered by any event, and with any action.

quickApps.name: Dirigera
quickApps.description: Bridge QuickApp for the Ikea Dirigera hub. Create QuickApps for your Dirigera devices.
